required_contains.text: What the file holds differs by key role. The key documentation notes that the coldkey keyfile
deliberately leaves out the secret seed and phrase because of the coldkey's high-security nature,
unlike the hotkey file, so the format protects less of the recovery material on the coldkey side by
design. It also warns that the encryption password is not a recovery path on its own: you cannot
retrieve the wallet with the password alone, which is why the seed phrase remains the real backup
